docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER GOLDMAN,SACHS & CO.,INC. AS TO RESPONDENT BLUSTEIN, HERMAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER GOLDMAN,SACHS & CO.,INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-19-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN CONFORMITY WITH ARBITRATION AWARD. RESPONDENT HERMAN BLUESTEIN'S CLAIMS IN THE ARBITRATION ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; THE COURT CONFIRMS THE ARBITRATION PANEL'S RECOMMENDATION THAT ALL REFERENCES TO HERMAN BLUESTEIN'S CLAIMS AND TO THE ARBITRATION HE FILED BE EXPUNGED FROM THE REGISTRATION RECORDS MAINTAINED BY NASD CENTRAL REGISTRATION DEPOSITORY FOR PETITIONER'S EMPLOYEES BRADLEY S. DEFOOR, JAMES E. MILLIGAN, DANIEL W. STANTON, CHARLES J. MICHAELS AND J. LYNN ROSE; AND EACH SIDE WILL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNES' FEES, FORUM FEES, AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH THIS ACTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GOLDMAN,SACHS & CO.,INC.'S AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT -- NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
